variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 8130 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 8130 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 8130 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25604 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8130
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25604 spin-on lube filter meets or exceeds OE performance requirements and the new challenges of modern engine technology.
